title: cylindrolobus neglectus
intro: Cylindrolobus neglectus, also known as "Neglected" or "Cylindrolobus," is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae, native to tropical Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves, which contain alkaloids and other compounds with potential health benefits. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions, including wounds, fever, and respiratory issues. Traditionally, Cylindrolobus neglectus is prepared as a tea, infusion, or powder for use in herbal medicine, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and optimal uses.
